verdict: A structurally sound and highly rhythmic chart let down by a physically impossible triple-panel hold and overly complex hold patterns unsuitable for an Easy difficulty.

issues.problem: Features a physically impossible triple-panel hold (L, U, and D held simultaneously). This is a critical charting error for standard single-play, especially on an Easy difficulty.
The rapid, overlapping 8th-note holds (shield holds) create an extreme difficulty spike that is far too complex and mentally taxing for beginner players on an Easy chart at 184 BPM.
Overlapping holds on syncopated steps (L and U) are excessively tricky for an Easy chart and should be simplified to standard taps or consecutive holds instead of concurrent ones.
